items.title: Bye Bye, Apple: September Dividend Income Report
items.description: September was a juicy month with several dividend payments. I also added more shares of CCL and SJ:CA to boost the payouts.

items.title: Home Depot sees shift in customer behavior
items.description: There's something about walking Home Depot's aisles that's relaxing. It's hard to put my finger on it, but perhaps it's rooted in a general sense of purpose — things need to get done, and this is where you go to help do them. The feeling of accomplishment from building, fixing, or improving your ...

items.title: iSpring Black Friday Sale Starts Now — Enjoy Limited-Time Discounts on Top-Rated Water Filtration Systems
items.description: ATLANTA, Nov. 03, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- This holiday season, iSpring Water Systems — a leading U.S. water filtration brand — kicks off its Early Black Friday Sale on Amazon, Home Depot and Lowes. items.title: I'm Betting Big On What Everyone Else Fears - The U.S. Consumer
items.description: U.S. consumers feel the pinch as inflation rises. Click here to read why I am focusing on high-quality, consumer-related value stocks and REITs.
